species: Human KLK8/neuropsin, a kallikrein-related serine peptidase, is mostly expressed in skin and the hippocampus regions of the brain
tissue: is mostly expressed in skin and the hippocampus regions of the brain
cell_type: important in neuron and skin physiology.
sample_source: KLK8 cDNA was obtained from ovarian tumor tissue mRNA
cell_line: Active, non-glycosylated KLK8 was prepared from a chimeric construct expressed in E. coli
strain: Active, non-glycosylated KLK8 was prepared from a chimeric construct expressed in E. coli
